project: Self-hosted Mikey CI Stabilization Loop (Local CI Gate)
description: Stabilize self-hosted CI by enforcing Mikey runner routing, fixing shard workflow regressions, and iterating until local CI-equivalent workflows are green before push.
exitCriteria: Local CI-equivalent suites pass for all failing PR workflows (self-hosted shard, hook tests, MCP smoke, docs self-hosted sanity).
Runner startup path is deterministic (no tar permission-denied initialization failures).
Current branch is pushed after local green state.

userStories.title: Enforce self-hosted-mikey runner routing
userStories.description: Ensure workflow selector fallback and repository variables route self-hosted jobs to the Mikey label strategy and do not use legacy custom labels.
acceptanceCriteria: All self-hosted workflows use vars.SELF_HOSTED_RUNNER_LABELS fallback consistently
Legacy custom labels are not required by workflow selectors

userStories.title: Fix self-hosted shard workflow execution path
userStories.description: Remove brittle checkout/token behavior and ensure shard jobs execute reliably on container runners.
acceptanceCriteria: Self-hosted shard workflow uses reliable checkout path
Harness + shard jobs can be scheduled and start on self-hosted-mikey
No regression to previous no-op shard behavior

userStories.title: Fix current core-mvp test regressions
userStories.description: Resolve failing tests identified in current self-hosted CI run for core-mvp shard(s), including frontend script order and streaming orchestrator patchability.
acceptanceCriteria: Streaming orchestrator tests pass with module patch target available
Targeted local test runs pass for changed failing suites
userStories.notes: Scope: mvp_site/frontend_v1/index.html, mvp_site/streaming_orchestrator.py, related tests only

userStories.title: Iterate until CI is green and publish status
userStories.description: Re-run self-hosted workflows, inspect failures, apply minimal fixes, and keep iterating until checks pass or a concrete external blocker remains.
acceptanceCriteria: Self-hosted MVP shards run reaches stable pass state or explicit external blocker
Current branch pushed with all fixes
Progress log captures final status and remaining blocker (if any)
userStories.notes: Use gh CLI for run/check inspection and evidence

userStories.title: Enforce local CI pass gate before push
userStories.description: Run local CI-equivalent commands for all currently failing workflow classes and require green local results as the primary iteration exit condition.
acceptanceCriteria: Local shard command(s) pass for all shard indexes under CI env.
Local MCP smoke command passes against expected mock target.
No local runner init permission failures during repeated self-hosted execution.
userStories.notes: Ralph should stop only when local gate is green or a concrete external-only blocker is recorded.
